prerequisites: A Salesforce account on an edition with API access (for example Enterprise, or Professional with the API add-on).
Administrator access to create a Connected App in the target Salesforce org.
Decide whether you are loading into a Production org or a Sandbox so you can set is_sandbox correctly.
(Optional) An S3 bucket plus an access key ID and secret access key if you want to store rejected records, used by object_storage_config.

authMethods.name: OAuth 2.0 (Salesforce Connected App refresh token)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a Salesforce Connected App. The Consumer Key maps to client_id and the Consumer Secret maps to client_secret, and a refresh_token is obtained from the OAuth flow so the connector can mint access tokens for renewed sessions. auth_type selects this credential style. These map to the descriptor secret field client_secret and refresh_token.

authMethods.name: S3 object storage credentials (optional, rejected-records storage only)
authMethods.summary: If object_storage_config is set to S3, provide an AWS access key ID and secret access key for the bucket that stores rejected records. These map to the descriptor secret fields object_storage_config.access_key_id and object_storage_config.secret_access_key. This is storage authentication, not Salesforce login.

setupSteps.title: Create a Connected App in Salesforce
setupSteps.body: Log in to Salesforce as an administrator and go to Setup, then App Manager, and click New Connected App. Provide an app name and contact email, then enable OAuth settings.

setupSteps.title: Configure OAuth settings and scopes
setupSteps.body: In the Connected App OAuth settings, set the callback URL and add the OAuth scopes for full access (full) and to perform requests on your behalf at any time (refresh_token, offline_access) so a refresh token can be issued.

setupSteps.title: Collect the client_id and client_secret
setupSteps.body: After saving the Connected App, copy the Consumer Key into the client_id field and the Consumer Secret into the client_secret field of the connector configuration.

setupSteps.title: Obtain the refresh_token
setupSteps.body: Run the Salesforce OAuth flow (Authenticate your account, or a manual web server flow against your callback URL) to obtain a refresh_token, and enter it into the refresh_token field.

setupSteps.title: Set the environment with is_sandbox
setupSteps.body: Set is_sandbox to true when connecting to a Salesforce Sandbox org, or false for a Production org, so the connector authenticates against the correct login host.

setupSteps.title: (Optional) Configure object_storage_config for rejected records
setupSteps.body: If you want rejected records persisted, configure object_storage_config for S3 with the bucket name, region, and path, plus object_storage_config.access_key_id and object_storage_config.secret_access_key for bucket access.
